# Stock Move picking assignment hook

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Tecnical module that allows to override the assignation of pickings to moves.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

Inherit from this module and override `stock.move._domain_search_picking_for_assignation`
to modify the domain used to search for pickings.
